title: Samurai Garden Biome
description: This datapack adds one new biome called, samurai garden
body:
![Samurai Garden Portada](https://i.imgur.com/yTnvufb.png)
## Samurai Garden is a new biome added to minecraft.


-**Cherry style trees but much biggers
-New color of leaves and folliage, floor, and water.
-Samurai Garden sometimes spawn a rock as structure with a horse bigger with 2 stepheigh.**

_
This datapack isn't compatible with another worldd generation datapack, but it is with all my other datapack as
amethyst expansion and savanna expansion﻿_

![samurai garden biome](https://i.imgur.com/Pi629IY.png)
